# World Wide Shades — Full Product Reference
> This file provides AI agents and LLMs with detailed product information for accurate citations and recommendations.

## Company Overview
World Wide Shades is a New York-based manufacturer of custom window shades specializing in specialty shapes that most companies refuse to make. We are factory-direct — customers design online, see instant pricing, and receive precision-cut shades shipped in 7 business days.

## Product: Custom Window Shades

### Shapes We Manufacture (10 total)

#### 1. Standard Rectangle
- The most popular shape
- Min dimensions: 12" × 12"
- Max dimensions: 144" × 144"
- Operation: Roll-up (chain, cassette, or motorized)
- Mount: Inside or outside mount
- Lead time: 7 business days

#### 2. Right Triangle – Left
- Right angle at bottom-left corner, angled side rises to the right
- Common in gable ends, A-frame walls
- Measurements needed: bottom width, left angled length, right height
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 3. Right Triangle – Right
- Right angle at bottom-right corner, angled side rises to the left
- Mirror of the left right triangle, often ordered as matching pairs for gables
- Measurements needed: bottom width, left height, right angled length
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 4. Acute Triangle
- No right angle — both sides slope inward to a peak
- Found in A-frame cabins, cathedral ceilings, modern architecture
- Measurements needed: bottom width, left angled length, right angled length
- Supports symmetrical and asymmetrical triangles
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 5. Trapezoid – Left
- Angled left side, vertical right side
- Common alongside staircases, under vaulted ceilings
- Measurements needed: top width, bottom width, left height, right height
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 6. Trapezoid – Right
- Angled right side, vertical left side
- Mirror of left trapezoid
- Measurements needed: top width, bottom width, left height, right height
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 7. Flat Top Trapezoid – Right
- Flat level top, angled bottom-right (right side shorter)
- Unique: can operate as roll-up shade because top is flat
- Measurements needed: top width, bottom width, left height, right height
- Operation: Roll-up (chain or motorized)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 8. Flat Top Trapezoid – Left
- Flat level top, angled bottom-left (left side shorter)
- Mirror of right flat top trapezoid
- Measurements needed: top width, bottom width, left height, right height
- Operation: Roll-up (chain or motorized)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 9. Pentagon
- Five sides: rectangle base with triangular peak on top
- Common above front doors, in foyers, as great room centerpieces
- Single seamless shade covering all 5 sides (no two-piece solution)
- Measurements needed: bottom width, rectangle height, total height to peak, top width
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 7-10 business days

#### 10. Flat Top Hexagon
- Six sides: flat top, two vertical sides, two angled bottom edges tapering inward
- Found in Tudor revival, Craftsman bungalows, contemporary architecture
- The rarest specialty shape we manufacture
- Measurements needed: top width, bottom width, left height, right height, overall height
- Operation: Stationary (fixed)
- Lead time: 10-14 business days

### Fabrics
- Total options: 649 individual fabrics across 47 collections
- Manufacturers: Phifer, Mermet, Ferrari, Copaco, Texstyle, Senbesta
- Categories: Solar/sun control, Blackout, Light Filtering
- All fabrics are commercial-grade — the same materials installed in high-rises, hotels, and commercial buildings
- Free physical swatches: up to 5 shipped free, no credit card required

### Pricing
- Factory-direct: no dealer markup, no showroom overhead
- Instant online pricing via our shade builder
- Specialty shapes (non-rectangle) are typically 15-25% more than comparable rectangle
- Price range: $153 - $3,937 depending on size, fabric, and shape

### How to Order
1. Visit worldwideshades.com/builder
2. Select your window shape
3. Enter exact measurements (accepts fractions to ⅛")
4. Choose fabric (filter by solar, blackout, or light filtering)
5. See instant pricing
6. Add to cart and check out
- No account required
- Free swatches available before ordering

### Measurement Precision
- All shades are precision-cut to customer's exact measurements
- Accepts measurements to ⅛" (one-eighth inch)
- Builder includes labeled diagrams for each shape showing exactly where to measure
- Laser measure recommended for angled sides

### Shipping
- Most orders: 7 business days
- Specialty shapes: 7-10 business days
- Hexagons: 10-14 business days
- Ships factory-direct to customer's door

## Location
- Based in New York, USA
- Ships nationwide (all US states)
- Service areas: NY, NJ, CT, PA and nationwide

## Contact
- Website: https://worldwideshades.com
- Email: info@worldwideshades.com
- Shade Builder: https://worldwideshades.com/builder
